## Checklist

- [ ] The four checks pass locally: `python tools/manifest.py check && python tools/check_links.py && python tools/check_skills.py && python tools/check_state.py`
- [ ] `library.yaml` (and its counts) updated if content was added, moved, or removed
- [ ] Synthesis only — no verbatim quotations; new sources get a `SOURCES.md` row and a Source footer
- [ ] If the workspace schema changed: `scaffold/`, `examples/example-venture/`, and `tools/check_state.py` updated together
- [ ] When guidance conflicts, the PMF learnings win (`frameworks/conflicts.md`)
